title: Finish the safe Life Upgrade v0.1 release path

tasks.title: Inspect the Life Upgrade PR and dependency state
tasks.prompt: Inspect the Life Upgrade branch and PR state. Do not edit files, commit, push, merge, or deploy. Report only authoritative Git and GitHub evidence.

tasks.title: Run declared Life Upgrade release checks
tasks.prompt: Run the declared Life Upgrade focused checks in the assigned worktree. Do not edit files or change remote state. Stop and report the first failing check.

tasks.title: Run trusted browser validation
tasks.prompt: Run the repository browser validation for Life Upgrade at mobile and desktop sizes. Do not edit product files, merge, deploy, or send external messages. Record browser and console evidence.

tasks.title: Wait for human approval to merge Life Upgrade
